# copick setup

*Set up and manage external integrations.*

## Usage

```bash
copick setup [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

## Description

Commands in this group set up and manage external integrations such as MCP
servers, database connections, and other third-party tools. Subcommands are
contributed by installed plugins.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| [`mcp`](mcp.md) | Setup Copick MCP server configuration for... |
| [`mcp-remove`](mcp-remove.md) | Remove Copick MCP server configuration. |
| [`mcp-status`](mcp-status.md) | Check Copick MCP server configuration status. |
